description: Deep Memory capture hooks for Codex default discovery. Claude Code auto-loads this standard file too, so each command is a shell-safe env-bootstrap that delegates to hooks.claude.json on a Claude host and fails open everywhere.

hooks.command: node -e "if(process.env.CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT){console.error('deep-memory session-start hook: claude host delegates capture to hooks.claude.json; codex hook skipped');process.exit(0)}const r=process.env.PLUGIN_ROOT||'';if(r===''){console.error('deep-memory session-start hook: plugin root env unset; capture skipped');process.exit(0)}try{require(require('node:path').join(r,'scripts','hook-bootstrap.cjs')).run('session-start')}catch(e){console.error('deep-memory session-start hook: bootstrap unavailable; capture skipped');process.exit(0)}"
hooks.commandWindows: node -e "if(process.env.CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT){console.error('deep-memory session-start hook: claude host delegates capture to hooks.claude.json; codex hook skipped');process.exit(0)}const r=process.env.PLUGIN_ROOT||'';if(r===''){console.error('deep-memory session-start hook: plugin root env unset; capture skipped');process.exit(0)}try{require(require('node:path').join(r,'scripts','hook-bootstrap.cjs')).run('session-start')}catch(e){console.error('deep-memory session-start hook: bootstrap unavailable; capture skipped');process.exit(0)}"
